summary: Stripe sandbox checkout flow tested. API returns real checkout.stripe.com URL. CheckoutModal opens correctly (NOT auto-enrolling). All key Stripe checkout flows verified.

feature_test_results.stripe_api_returns_real_url: PASS - POST /api/payments/checkout with crs_agile_scrum returns checkout_url starting with https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_...
feature_test_results.checkout_modal_opens: PASS - Logged-in student clicks Buy Now on paid course -> CheckoutModal opens showing STRIPE TEST MODE, course name, price, Continue to Stripe Checkout button
feature_test_results.no_auto_enrollment: PASS - Clicking Buy Now on paid course opens modal (not auto-enrolled); URL stays at /courses/crs_agile_scrum
feature_test_results.checkout_url_format: PASS - checkout_url is https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_... (real Stripe, not /checkout/success sandbox URL)
feature_test_results.unauthenticated_redirect: NOT RETESTED - Verified in iteration_4. Buy Now -> /login -> back to course (confirmed fixed)

api_test_results.POST /api/payments/checkout (crs_agile_s: 200 OK - checkout_url: https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_a1E4... - Is real Stripe URL: True

critical_code_review_comments: Modal shows 'One-time sandbox payment' label and 'STRIPE TEST MODE' badge - this is expected for test key environment
CheckoutModal properly calls POST /api/payments/checkout and uses window.location.assign(result.checkout_url) to redirect to Stripe
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe checkout flow fully verified: (1) API returns real https://checkout.stripe.com URLs with sk_test_51TkU9ME key. (2) CheckoutModal opens on Buy Now click (no auto-enrollment). (3) Modal shows course name, price, test card hint, Continue to Stripe Checkout button. Did not test actual Stripe payment completion (out of scope). Free course enrollment not retested in this iteration.
